title: 10 best herbal decoctions for hormonal imbalance
intro_desc: Herbal decoctions for hormonal imbalance are a natural remedy that combines the potency of herbs to address hormonal imbalances in the body. By steeping herbs like chasteberry, red clover, and Dong quai in hot water, these decoctions can help regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and restore balance to the endocrine system. For example, a woman who struggles with irregular periods may find relief from using a decoction made with chasteberry, leading to improved fertility and overall well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dong quai decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it has a regulating effect on the body's endocrine system. The herbs present in dong quai, such as angelica sinensis and cimicifuga racemosa, have been shown to help balance the production of estrogen and progesterone hormones, which are essential for menstrual cycles and fertility. Additionally, dong quai decoctions may also stimulate the release of follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH) and luteinizing hormone (LH), promoting a healthy menstrual cycle and addressing symptoms of polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_properties: Estrogen-balancing properties: Dong quai's decoction has been shown to balance estrogen levels by stimulating the production of progesterone and inhibiting the conversion of testosterone to estrogen, which can alleviate symptoms of menopause, PMS, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Adrenocortical effects: The decoction of dong quai has been found to stimulate the adrenal glands, which can help regulate cortisol levels and reduce stress-induced hormonal imbalances, leading to improved mood, energy, and overall hormonal balance.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: Dong quai's decoction contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which are thought to contribute to hormonal imbalance and related symptoms such as endometriosis and fibroids.
remedy_constituents: Ligustilide: This sesquiterpene lactone has been shown to modulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, helping to regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.

Butylphthalide: A sesquiterpene, butylphthalide has been found to possess anti-estrogenic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance, such as hot flashes and mood swings, in women experiencing menopause.

Cui-Qing-Chai oil: This essential oil, rich in sesquiterpenes and phenolic compounds, has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps, PMS, and other hormonal imbalances.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in ferulic acid and other phytochemicals that help regulate hormone production.
Stems: Contain a compound called ligustilide, which has anti-inflammatory properties and helps balance hormone levels.
Leaves: High in antioxidants and flavonoids that help reduce oxidative stress and promote hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 10-15 grams of dried angelica sinensis root to prepare herbal decoction.
Boil 2 liters of water in a pot for 5-7 minutes to reach desired temperature.
Combine the weighed angelica sinensis root with the boiling water in the pot.
Simmer the mixture for 10-15 minutes to extract active compounds from the root.
Strain the decoction and discard the solids to obtain the final herbal tea.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chinese peony decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains bioactive compounds that can regulate and balance the body's endocrine system. The decoction has been shown to have a regulating effect on estrogen levels, which is particularly beneficial for women experiencing menstrual irregularities, PMS symptoms, or menopausal hot flashes. Additionally, peony root is believed to strengthen the kidneys, which are closely linked to hormonal function, thereby promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic and Anti-Anxiety Effects: Peony decoctions help regulate hormonal balance by reducing stress and anxiety, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances.

Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Peony's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance, such as mood swings, hot flashes, and sleep disturbances, by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body.

Hormone Regulating Effects on the Liver and Kidneys: Peony decoctions are believed to tonify (strengthen) the liver and kidneys, which helps regulate hormone production and metabolism, promoting hormonal balance and reducing symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds help alleviate hormonal imbalance by exhibiting estrogen-modulating effects, which can aid in regulating the body's hormonal balance and reduce the risk of hormone-related disorders.

Alkaloids: Paeonia lactiflora contains various alkaloids, including paeoniflorin, which has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to mitigate the negative effects of hormonal imbalance on the body.

Saponins: Saponins in Paeonia lactiflora decoctions have been shown to possess anti-stress and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help regulate the body's response to hormonal fluctuations, thereby promoting a balanced hormonal state.
remedy_parts: Roots: Paeonia lactiflora roots are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their high concentration of miltirone, which has estrogen-modulating properties.

Flowers: Paeonia lactiflora flowers are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their content of isoflavones, which can help regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of menopause.

Leaves: Paeonia lactiflora leaves are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their ability to balance and regulate hormonal fluctuations, particularly for women experiencing menstrual irregularities.
remedy_recipe: Harvest paeonia lactiflora roots and clean them thoroughly by rinsing with cold water.
Cut the cleaned roots into small pieces weighing 9 to 12 grams per 250ml water.
Boil the root pieces in 250ml of water for 5 to 7 minutes or until the liquid reduces by half.
Filter the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.
Store the decoction in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate the pituitary gland's function, which in turn affects the production of hormones such as estrogen and progesterone. The herbal remedy contains flavonoids and terpenes that interact with the body's hormone receptors, promoting a balance between the two primary female hormones. This natural approach can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, including menstrual irregularities, PMS, and menopausal discomfort, allowing for a more harmonious balance of bodily functions.
remedy_properties: Vasoprotective compounds: Chaste tree decoctions contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and lignans that have vasoprotective properties, which helps to regulate blood flow and reduce inflammation in the body, thereby addressing hormonal imbalances.

Hormone-regulating triterpenes: The decoction contains triterpenoid saponins that help regulate hormonal activity by modulating the production of estrogen and progesterone, thus supporting normal reproductive function and alleviating symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance.

Antioxidant activity: Chaste tree decoctions exhibit potent antioxidant properties, which help to neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress in the body, thereby protecting against cellular damage and promoting overall hormonal balance.
remedy_constituents: Iridoids: Iridoids, specifically agnuside and aucubin, have been found to influence the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis, which is involved in regulating hormone balance and menstrual cycles.

Phenylethanoids: Phenylethanoids, including acteoside and isoacteoside, have been shown to have a positive effect on the luteinizing hormone (LH) and follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH) levels, helping to regulate ovulation and menstrual cycles.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids, including vitexin and isovitexin, have antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance and other health issues.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Vitex agnus castus flowers are commonly used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance because they contain a high concentration of flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have a regulating effect on hormones.
Leaves: Vitex agnus castus leaves are used in decoctions due to their ability to balance the endocrine system and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Seeds: Vitex agnus castus seeds are used in decoctions for their saponin content, which has been found to help regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of PMS.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 to 2 teaspoons of dried vitex agnus castus berries and 2 cups of boiling water.
Steep the vitex agnus castus berries in the boiling water for 5 to 10 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
Discard the solids and transfer the liquid to a glass bottle for storage.
Store the decoction in the refrigerator for up to 3 days before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Motherwort decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate the body's endocrine system. The herb contains flavonoids, which have a natural affinity for binding to estrogen receptors, helping to balance estrogen levels and reduce symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as PMS and menopause. Additionally, motherwort has been shown to stimulate the pituitary gland, promoting the production of hormones necessary for proper reproductive function, resulting in improved overall hormonal harmony.
remedy_properties: Cardiotonic action: Motherwort's cardiotonic properties help to stabilize and regulate the heartbeat, which can be beneficial in reducing symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as palpitations and anxiety.

Anti-inflammatory and anti-estrogenic effects: The decoction's anti-inflammatory and anti-estrogenic properties may help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with estrogen dominance, such as breast tenderness and mood swings.
Calming and sedative effects: Motherwort's calming and sedative properties can help to reduce stress and anxiety related to hormonal imbalance, promoting a sense of calm and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid Glycosides: These compounds have a regulating effect on the endocrine system, helping to balance hormonal imbalances, particularly those related to the thyroid and adrenal glands.
Flavonoids: As antioxidants, flavonoids help protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances and other endocrine disorders.

Rosmarinicine (an Alkaloid): This alkaloid has been shown to have a regulating effect on the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, helping to balance cortisol levels and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used for their adaptogenic and anti-stress properties.
Flowers: Used for their estrogen-regulating and balancing effects.
Seeds: Used for their hormonal regulating and antioxidant properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2-3 handfuls of dried or 20-30 grams of fresh leonurus sibiricus leaves and flowers.
Chop the harvested material into small pieces to increase its surface area.
Combine the chopped material with 1 liter of boiling water to make a decoction.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes to allow the active compounds to infuse into the water.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve to remove the solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains compounds that have a regulatory effect on the body's hormonal systems. Glycyrrhizin, a key component of licorice root, has been shown to stimulate the production of progesterone and cortisol, two hormones that are crucial for maintaining a healthy balance in women. Additionally, licorice decoctions can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. By promoting hormone regulation and reducing inflammation, licorice decoctions may help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance such as mood swings, hot flashes, and insomnia.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: Licorice root contains glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to balance cortisol levels and reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances.

Isoflavones: Herbal licorice decoctions contain isoflavones, plant-based compounds that have estrogen-like properties, helping to regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes and mood swings.

Flavonoids: Licorice root flavonoids, particularly luteolin and apigenin, have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect against hormone-related damage and oxidative stress in the body.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: A triterpenoid saponin, glycyrrhizin has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to regulate cortisol levels and balance adrenal function, which in turn can alleviate hormonal imbalances.

Liquiritin: A phenolic glycoside, liquiritin exhibits anti-androgenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce cortisol levels, alleviate symptoms of polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), and promote overall hormonal balance.

Isoliquiritigenin: A lignan, isoliquiritigenin has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hormonal imbalances, and may also have a direct impact on the regulation of sex hormones.
remedy_parts: Roots: Glycyrrhizin-rich roots: The main active compound glycyrrhizin, found in the roots, helps in balancing cortisol levels and addressing hormonal imbalances.
Leaves: Amino acids and saponins in leaves: The leaves are rich in various amino acids and saponins that contribute to the hormonal-balancing properties of decoctions made from Glycyrrhiza glabra.
Barks: Flavonoids and phenolic acids in barks: The barks of the plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that contribute to its ability to regulate hormonal imbalances.
remedy_recipe: Gather 5-10 grams of dried glycyrrhiza glabra root and 1 liter of water for decoction.
Rinse the dried root in cold water to remove impurities and debris.
Combine the root with water in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer the decoction for 10-15 minutes to extract active compounds.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Skunkvine decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains bioactive compounds that interact with the body's endocrine system. The plant's phytochemicals, particularly flavonoids and alkaloids, exhibit estrogen-like properties, which can help regulate hormonal activity. By modulating the body's hormone production and metabolism, skunkvine decoctions may alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances. Estrogen modulating activity: Skunkvine has been shown to have estrogen-modulating properties, which can help regulate menstrual cycles, reduce hot flashes and night sweats, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and PMS.

remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Paederia foetida decoctions may help with hormonal imbalance by exerting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, thus regulating the balance of hormones in the body.

Saponins: Saponins found in Paederia foetida decoctions may help with hormonal imbalance by modulating the activity of certain enzymes involved in hormone regulation, thereby maintaining hormonal balance.

remedy_parts: Leaves: Used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their purported ability to regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
Roots: Utilized for their potential to normalize hormonal imbalances by promoting the production of thyroid hormones and regulating menstrual cycles.

remedy_recipe: Gather 10-15 grams of dried paederia foetida roots and stems and wash them thoroughly with water.
Chop the cleaned paederia foetida roots and stems into small pieces to increase surface area.
Boil 1 liter of water in a saucepan for 5 minutes to achieve optimal temperature.
Steep the chopped paederia foetida in the boiling water for 10-15 minutes to release active compounds.
Strain the paederia foetida decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve to remove solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild yam decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain diosgenin, a compound that converts to progesterone in the body. This natural conversion process can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances such as PMS, hot flashes, and mood swings. The decoction also contains other beneficial compounds like saponins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. By regulating hormone levels and reducing inflammation, wild yam decoctions may promote overall health and well-being for individuals experiencing hormonal imbalance.
remedy_properties: Diosgenin: This phytochemical has estrogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help regulate hormonal imbalances by reducing inflammation and promoting balanced estrogen production.
Saponins: The saponin content in wild yam decoction has been shown to have a regulatory effect on hormone levels, particularly estrogen and testosterone, helping to normalize hormonal imbalances.

Flavonoids: Wild yam's flavonoid compounds possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Dioscorea villosa decoctions help with hormonal imbalance by acting as a natural estrogen regulator, supporting the balance of estrogen levels in the body.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids present in Dioscorea villosa decoctions help with hormonal imbalance by exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can contribute to a balanced hormonal environment.

Steroidal saponins: Steroidal saponins in Dioscorea villosa decoctions help with hormonal imbalance by regulating the production and secretion of hormones, particularly insulin and sex hormones, thus supporting the body's natural hormonal balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of diosgenin, a steroidal saponin responsible for their medicinal properties.
Seeds: They are also used due to their high content of diosgenin and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to the treatment of hormonal imbalances.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 to 200 grams of dioscorea villosa rhizomes from a clean source and thoroughly wash them.
Chop the harvested rhizomes into small pieces using a sharp knife or tool and weigh out 30 grams.
Combine the chopped rhizomes with 1 liter of water in a pot and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to a simmer and allow the decoction to steep for 30 to 60 minutes.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container to remove solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dog holly decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its unique ability to regulate and balance canine hormones. The plant's bioactive compounds, including isoflavones and flavonoids, have been shown to mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to restore natural hormone levels and alleviate symptoms such as anxiety, aggression, and urinary incontinence. By supporting hormonal equilibrium, herbal dog holly decoctions can promote overall health and well-being in dogs, particularly those experiencing menopause-like symptoms or reproductive issues.
remedy_properties: Flavonoids: Dog holly decoctions contain flavonoids, which have been shown to act as estrogen modulators, helping to regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause such as hot flashes and night sweats.

Saponins: Saponins in dog holly decoctions have been found to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation caused by hormonal imbalances and alleviate symptoms such as breast tenderness and mood swings.

Phenolic acids: Phenolic acids in dog holly decoctions have antioxidant and anti-estrogenic effects, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage caused by hormonal imbalance, promoting overall health and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Ruscus aculeatus decoctions help alleviate hormonal imbalance by inhibiting the production of androgens, which can contribute to conditions like hirsutism and acne.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in Ruscus aculeatus decoctions exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hormonal imbalances, particularly in the context of menopause and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Triterpenoids: Triterpenoids found in Ruscus aculeatus decoctions have been shown to possess anti-androgenic and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms of conditions like hirsutism and acne.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their estrogenic properties, which help balance hormonal levels in the body.
Roots: They are used for their ability to regulate hormonal balance and reduce symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ruscus aculeatus roots and leaves in the morning to ensure maximum potency.
Cut the harvested ruscus aculeatus roots and leaves into small pieces to increase surface area.
Combine 2 teaspoons of the cut ruscus aculeatus roots and leaves with 1 quart of cold water in a saucepan.
Boil the mixture over high heat for 10 to 15 minutes to release the active compounds.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container to remove solids.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it is rich in phytoestrogens, which are plant-based compounds that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. The decoction has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, by helping to regulate hormonal levels. Additionally, its adaptogenic properties allow it to support the body's natural balance, promoting overall well-being and hormonal harmony.
remedy_properties: Folacin (Vitamin B9): Helps to regulate hormonal imbalances by supporting the synthesis of neurotransmitters and hormones, such as serotonin and estrogen.
Antioxidants: Neutralizes free radicals that can disrupt hormone balance and contribute to conditions like polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) and endometriosis.
Phytoestrogens: Mimics the effects of estrogen in the body, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as hot flashes, mood swings, and vaginal dryness.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These compounds help alleviate hormonal imbalance by scavenging free radicals and reducing oxidative stress, which is known to contribute to hormonal imbalances.

Terpenoids (specifically Bilobalide): Bilobalide has been shown to have a protective effect on the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, a key regulator of hormone production, thereby helping to maintain hormonal balance.

Triterpenoids (specifically Ginkgolides): Ginkgolides have been found to modulate the production and activity of various hormones, including insulin and thyroid hormones, thus helping to stabilize hormonal levels.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are the most commonly used part due to their high flavonoid and terpenoid content, which helps balance hormones and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Barks: The barks are used for their ginkgolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help regulate hormonal imbalances and promote overall well-being.
Roots: The roots are used for their ginkgolides, which have antioxidant properties that can help stabilize hormonal fluctuations and promote hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 ounce of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and store them in a clean dry container.
Measure 250 milliliters of water and boil it in a saucepan over high heat.
Add the dried ginkgo biloba leaves to the boiling water and reduce heat to medium.
Steep the mixture for 10 to 15 minutes or until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a cup.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Mongolian dandelion decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains compounds that support the body's natural detoxification processes, specifically targeting estrogen metabolism. The plant's rich antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. Additionally, Mongolian dandelion's ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys enhances their function in processing and excreting hormones, promoting a healthy balance of estrogen and other sex hormones in the body. This natural approach helps regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support overall reproductive health.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Mongolian Dandelion helps adapt the body to stress, which can alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as anxiety and mood swings. This is because it contains compounds like inulin, which has been shown to reduce cortisol levels and promote feelings of calm.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties: The decoction's rich antioxidant content helps combat oxidative stress and inflammation, both of which are linked to hormonal imbalances. This can help regulate hormonal production and alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes and night sweats.

Hormone-balancing phytoestrogens: Mongolian Dandelion contains plant-based estrogens (phytoestrogens) like isoflavones, which can help balance estrogen levels in the body. This can be particularly beneficial for women experiencing hormonal imbalances such as menopause, polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), and endometriosis.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: They help with hormonal imbalance by exhibiting anti-estrogenic and anti-androgenic properties, thereby modulating the body's hormonal balance and alleviating symptoms associated with hormonal disorders.

Terpenoids (including sesquiterpenoids and triterpenoids): They aid in hormonal balance by acting as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agents, which can help mitigate the oxidative stress and inflammation associated with hormonal imbalances.

Phenylethanoid glycosides: They contribute to hormonal balance by exerting estrogen-modulating effects, potentially helping to alleviate symptoms of estrogen-related disorders such as menopausal hot flashes and irregular menstrual cycles.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used for their potential to regulate hormones and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds.
Flowers: Taraxacum mongolicum flowers are used in decoctions to help stabilize hormones and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as mood swings and irregular menstrual cycles.

Seeds: The seeds of Taraxacum mongolicum are used in decoctions to help regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance, such as PMS and irregular periods, due to their potential anti-inflammatory and estrogen-regulating properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest taraxacum mongolicum roots in late summer or early fall when the plant is in full growth.
Clean the roots thoroughly with water to remove any dirt and debris from the harvesting process.
Chop the roots into small pieces with a sharp knife to increase their surface area for infusion.
Combine 30 grams of chopped taraxacum mongolicum roots with 1 liter of boiling water in a heat-resistant container.
Steep the mixture for 30-40 minutes to allow the active ingredients to infuse into the water.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Milk thistle decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains silymarin, a potent flavonoid compound that has been shown to have estrogen-balancing properties. By reducing the production of excessive estrogen and increasing the elimination of toxins from the body, milk thistle decoction can help alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances such as PMS, menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). Additionally, its antioxidant properties help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the endocrine system, promoting overall hormone balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Silymarin: Milk thistle's active compound silymarin has been shown to have estrogen-regulating effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes and mood swings.

Antioxidant properties: Milk thistle's antioxidants help protect the body from oxidative stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by damaging cells and tissues; by neutralizing free radicals, silymarin and other antioxidants in milk thistle can help maintain healthy hormone function.

Hepatoprotective effects: Milk thistle has been found to have a protective effect on the liver, which is responsible for processing and regulating hormones; by supporting liver health, milk thistle decoctions may help improve overall hormonal balance and reduce symptoms of imbalance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, which have been shown to help regulate estrogen metabolism and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Seeds: Containing a high concentration of flavonoids, which may help to stabilize and balance hormone levels.
remedy_recipe: Measure one tablespoon of dried silybum marianum herb into a clean glass container for every eight ounces of water needed.
Combine the measured herbs with water in a medium-sized pot and bring it to a boil over high heat for ten minutes.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for another 20-25 minutes or until the liquid has reduced by half.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container, discarding any remaining solids.
Cool the decoction to room temperature before transferring it to an airtight container and storing it in the refrigerator for up to five days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its unique combination of bioactive compounds, particularly curcuminoids. These compounds have been shown to positively impact hormone regulation by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. By modulating the activity of enzymes involved in hormone metabolism, turmeric decoctions can help balance estrogen and progesterone levels, alleviate symptoms of PMS and menopause, and even support thyroid function. Additionally, curcumin's anti-inflammatory properties may also help soothe hormonal imbalances related to stress and anxiety.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, alleviating hormonal imbalances caused by chronic inflammation.
Antioxidant Activity: Curcumin's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage hormones and disrupt their balance, promoting healthy hormone production and metabolism.
Modulation of Hormone Receptors: Turmeric has been shown to modulate estrogen and thyroid hormone receptors, helping to regulate hormonal activity and restore balance to the endocrine system.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Known as Curcuma longa, the rhyzome contains a high concentration of curcuminoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help regulate hormone levels.
Roots: Turmeric roots are rich in fiber, vitamins, and minerals, making them an excellent ingredient for balancing hormones and alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 teaspoon of dried turmeric root powder or 2-3 medium-sized fresh turmeric roots.
Measure 250ml of water and bring it to a boil in a pot.
Add the turmeric powder or roots to the boiling water and reduce heat to a simmer.
Allow the mixture to steep for 10-15 minutes, then strain and discard solids.
Store the decoction in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have a regulating effect on the body's endocrine system. These compounds help to reduce inflammation and improve circulation, allowing for optimal hormone production and balance. Additionally, ginger has been shown to stimulate the liver's natural detoxification processes, helping to eliminate excess hormones and toxins that can disrupt hormonal balance. By promoting healthy hormone function and elimination, ginger decoctions can provide relief from symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, such as mood swings, fatigue, and weight gain.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Ginger's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by protecting hormones from damage and promoting a healthy endocrine system.

Anti-inflammatory effects: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, can help alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance, promoting a smoother and more balanced hormonal cycle.

Regulation of estrogen metabolism: Ginger has been shown to regulate estrogen metabolism by inhibiting the activity of enzymes involved in the breakdown of estrogens, which can help reduce the risk of hormone-related disorders such as endometriosis, polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), and breast cancer.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in bioactive compounds, rhyzomes help regulate hormone production and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.
Roots: With their high concentration of volatile oils and other active compounds, roots are used to stimulate hormone secretion and balance.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried ginger roots of zingiber officinale in amounts of one teaspoon per serving.
Measure and grind the dried ginger roots into fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Boil 500ml of filtered water for five minutes to create a hot decoction base.
Add one teaspoon of ground ginger powder to the boiling water and steep for seven minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kava decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate the body's endocrine system. The plant's active compounds, kavalactones, have been shown to normalize thyroid function and balance cortisol levels, leading to a reduction in stress and anxiety-related hormonal imbalances. Additionally, kava has been found to support adrenal function, promoting a healthy balance of estrogen and progesterone hormones. remedy_properties: Anxiolytic (calming) effects: Kava's anxiolytic properties help to reduce stress and anxiety, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by alleviating the body's "fight or flight" response.
Antioxidant activity: Kava's antioxidant properties help to protect the body from free radicals that can damage cells and disrupt hormone function, particularly in cases of estrogen dominance.
GABA-enhancing effects: Kava's ability to increase GABA (gamma-aminobutyric acid) levels in the brain helps to regulate neurotransmitters and hormones, promoting a sense of calm and balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, the roots of the kava plant have been traditionally used to regulate hormones and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of the kava plant contain high levels of kavalactones, which are responsible for its anxiolytic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in addressing hormonal imbalance-related stress and anxiety.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 tablespoon of dried kava root powder and 2 cups of boiling water.
Combine the kava root powder with boiling water in a heat-resistant glass measuring cup.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes, allowing the active compounds to infuse into the water.
Strain the decoction through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a clean glass container.
Store the cooled herbal decoction in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain a unique blend of phytochemicals that interact with the body's endocrine system. The decoction's rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins has been shown to regulate estrogen levels, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support thyroid function. Additionally, maypop's adaptogenic properties allow it to calm and balance the nervous system, reducing stress-induced hormonal fluctuations and promoting overall hormonal harmony.
remedy_properties: Aphrodisiac and adaptogenic properties: Maypop decoction helps to regulate hormones by increasing testosterone levels in both men and women, while also reducing stress and anxiety caused by hormonal imbalance.

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity: Maypop's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances and related symptoms such as PMS and mood swings.

Estrogen-balancing flavonoids: The flavonoids present in Maypop decoction have been shown to have a regulatory effect on estrogen levels, helping to balance out excessive estrogen dominance or low estrogen production.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in estrogenic compounds, making them effective in regulating hormone imbalances and alleviating menopausal symptoms.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to normalize hormonal levels and reduce the risk of hormone-related disorders.
remedy_recipe: Gather 30-40 grams of dried passiflora incarnata flowers and 2 cups of water to create the decoction.
Combine the dried herbs with the water in a medium-sized pot and bring it to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the mixture for 15 minutes, allowing the flavors and properties to infuse.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid extract.
Transfer the extracted liquid to a clean glass bottle, store it in the refrigerator for up to 3 days, and consume 1/2 cup twice daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to regulate and calm the nervous system, which is closely linked to hormonal balance. The herb's natural sedative properties help to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for hormonal imbalances. By promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels, valerian decoctions can help restore balance to the body's endocrine system, leading to improvements in menstrual cycles, mood regulation, and overall hormone function. This natural remedy has been used for centuries to support women's health and promote hormonal harmony.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic activity: Valerian root has adaptogenic properties, which means it helps the body adapt to stress and hormonal changes, reducing the negative impact on hormone regulation.

Anxiolytic effects: Valerian's anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) properties help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalances, such as anxiety, insomnia, and mood swings, by promoting relaxation and reducing cortisol levels.

Estrogen-balancing effects: Valerian root has been shown to have estrogen-balancing properties, which can help regulate menstrual cycles, reduce PMS symptoms, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in valerenic acid, which helps regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
Rhizomes: Contain a high concentration of essential oils that calm nervous system imbalances and promote hormone balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh valerian roots in autumn or spring for optimal potency and quality.
Cut the harvested roots into small pieces and rinse them under running water.
Combine 10g of chopped valerian root with 1 liter of boiling filtered water and steep for 5-7 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean container discarding solids.
Store the decoction in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for future use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to soothe and regulate the endocrine system. The phytoestrogens present in lavender, particularly linalool and linalyl acetate, mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to balance out any fluctuations. This can lead to a decrease in symptoms such as hot flashes, mood swings, and irregular periods associated with menopause and PMS. Additionally, lavender's calming properties can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are often linked to hormonal imbalance. By promoting relaxation and equilibrium, English lavender decoctions provide a natural and gentle approach to addressing hormonal imbalances.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects: Lavender's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances by reducing the body's natural ability to regulate hormone production.

Anxiolytic and calming effects: The anxiolytic (anxiety-reducing) and calming properties of lavender can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as anxiety, mood swings, and irritability by promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels.

Endocrine-modulating effects: Lavender has been shown to modulate the endocrine system, specifically the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, which is responsible for regulating hormone production and balance. This can help regulate hormonal imbalances by normalizing cortisol and other hormone levels.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the English lavender plant have been traditionally used to regulate hormonal imbalances due to their adaptogenic properties, which help the body respond to stress and promote balance.
Seeds: English lavender seeds have been used in herbal medicine to support menstrual health and alleviate symptoms associated with PMS, such as cramping and mood swings.
remedy_recipe: Measure 2 teaspoons of dried lavender flowers per cup of boiling water.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes in a heat-resistant glass container.
Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a separate vessel.
Allow the decoction to cool and then store it in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
Take 1 cup of the cooled decoction thrice daily for a period of 2-3 weeks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains bioactive compounds that have a regulatory effect on the body's endocrine system. The herb's flavonoids and hyperforin work together to modulate hormone production, alleviating symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopause, and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). Additionally, St John's Wort has been shown to regulate cortisol levels, reducing stress-related hormonal imbalances. By promoting balance in the body's hormonal systems, this herbal decoction can bring relief to individuals experiencing hormonal imbalance-related issues.
remedy_properties: Hyperforin: A primary active compound in St John's Wort, hyperforin has been shown to increase the production of serotonin and other neurotransmitters, which can help regulate hormonal balance by influencing the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis.

Flavonoids: Flavonoids present in St John's Wort have antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation that may contribute to hormonal imbalances, particularly in women with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).

Iridoid glycosides: These compounds have been shown to have a regulatory effect on the pituitary gland, which plays a critical role in hormone production and balance, making St John's Wort decoctions useful for addressing issues such as thyroid dysfunction and adrenal fatigue.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are believed to help regulate hormonal imbalances by normalizing cortisol levels and reducing stress.
Leaves: The leaves contain hypericin, a compound that helps to soothe and calm the body, promoting balance in hormone production.
Flowers: The flowers are rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to modulate hormonal activity and improve symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS).
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried st john's wort flowers and leaves in quantities of one ounce per cup of water.
Combine the herb mixture with boiling water in a heat-resistant container for preparation times of 20-30 minutes.
Allow the mixture to steep and cool before straining it through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass jar.
Store the decoction in the refrigerator at temperatures below 39 degrees fahrenheit for up to seven days.
Drink three cups of the hypericum perforatum decoction daily, ideally between meals and at bedtime.

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hormonal imbalance that are treated with herbal decoctions are menopause symptoms, PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome), and thyroid disorders. Herbal decoctions such as black cohosh, St. John's Wort, and dong quai help alleviate hot flashes, mood swings, and sleep disturbances associated with menopause. Decoctions like chasteberry, dandelion, and bladderwrack may also help regulate ovulation, reduce acne, and improve thyroid function in individuals with PCOS or hypothyroidism.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal decoctions that help with hormonal imbalance is a blend of Ashwagandha, Maca, and Dong Quai. Ashwagandha helps regulate cortisol levels and reduce stress, while Maca balances estrogen and testosterone levels. Dong Quai, rich in iron and antioxidants, supports adrenal function and promotes menstrual health. This combination works synergistically to alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance, such as mood swings, fatigue, and irregular periods, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.

remedies.remedy_desc: Angelica sinensis decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because they contain compounds like ferulic acid and ligustilide, which may have a regulating effect on estrogen levels. The decoctions also contain estrogen-like properties, which can help balance the body's natural hormone production. Furthermore, the anti-inflammatory properties of Angelica sinensis may contribute to its ability to alleviate hormonal imbalances by reducing inflammation in the endocrine system, ultimately promoting a more balanced hormonal state and overall well-being. This makes it a popular choice for women experiencing menopausal symptoms.
remedy_constituents: Ligustilide: Helps regulate hormonal balance by modulating the body's stress response and reducing cortisol levels, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances.
Butylphthalide: Exerts estrogen-like effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as hot flashes and mood swings.
Coumarins: Display anti-estrogenic properties, helping to counteract estrogen dominance and alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance such as heavy bleeding and mood changes.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, making them a primary source of medicinal properties.
Leaves: Contain essential oils and flavonoids that contribute to their therapeutic effects.
Stems: Similar to roots, they are rich in bioactive compounds, including ferulic acid and other phenolic acids.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried angelica sinensis roots in late summer or early fall when the plant is in full maturity.
Chop the harvested angelica sinensis roots into small pieces and weigh out 9-15 grams of the dried material.
Combine the chopped angelica sinensis roots with 1 liter of boiling water in a large pot.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the angelica sinensis decoction for 30-40 minutes to release its active constituents.
Strain the angelica sinensis decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because its bioactive compounds, such as glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, exhibit adaptogenic and estrogen-modulating properties. These compounds help regulate cortisol levels, thereby influencing the body's natural hormonal balance. Additionally, Glycyrrhiza glabra has been found to have a balancing effect on the thyroid gland, which plays a crucial role in regulating metabolism and hormonal equilibrium. Its use may also help alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings.
remedy_constituents: Glycyrrhizin: It helps with hormonal imbalance by inhibiting the activity of 11-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase, an enzyme that converts cortisone into cortisol, thus reducing cortisol levels and alleviating stress-induced hormonal imbalances.

Flavonoids (especially Isoflavones): They help with hormonal imbalance by acting as estrogen agonists, thereby potentially alleviating menopausal symptoms, and also by modulating the activity of various enzymes involved in the biosynthesis and degradation of hormones.

Saponins (especially Triterpenoid Saponins): They help with hormonal imbalance by modulating the activity of the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis, reducing cortisol levels, and also by exhibiting antioxidant properties that protect against oxidative stress-induced hormonal imbalances.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra are commonly used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their high concentration of glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties and can help regulate cortisol levels.

Leaves: The leaves of Glycyrrhiza glabra are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties that help stabilize hormone levels.

Roots (again, as the roots are the most commonly used part): The roots of Glycyrrhiza glabra are also used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their ability to help regulate the adrenal gland and balance cortisol levels.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 2-5 grams of dried roots of the plant and place them in a heat-resistant container.
Add 1 liter of water to the container and bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 30-40 minutes or until the liquid is reduced.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into another container.
Discard the solids and let the decoction cool to room temperature before using it.

remedies.remedy_desc: Paeonia lactiflora decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its rich content of phytoestrogens and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's roots have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to balance the body's energy and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances. The decoctions work by stimulating the adrenal glands, regulating the thyroid, and modulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis. This leads to improved hormonal balance, reduced stress, and enhanced overall well-being. Regular consumption may also help to alleviate symptoms of menopause and polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS).
remedy_constituents: Paeoniflorin: Acts as an estrogen modulator, helping to regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms associated with estrogen dominance.
Paeonol: Exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that contribute to hormonal imbalance.
Gallic acid: Possesses estrogen-regulating and antioxidant properties, which can help mitigate the effects of hormonal imbalance and promote overall endocrine system health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Roots: The primary part used for decoctions due to their rich content of alkaloids and glycosides, which are believed to influence hormonal balance.
Flowers: Flowers: They are used to make decoctions as they contain a high concentration of flavonoids, which are thought to have a regulating effect on hormonal imbalances.
Leaves: Leaves: The leaves are also used for decoctions as they contain volatile oils and other compounds that may help stabilize hormonal balances.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 30-60 grams of dried paeonia lactiflora roots and peel to prepare the herbal material.
Crush the dried herbal material into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for efficient infusion.
Combine the crushed herbal material with 1 liter of water in a saucepan for decoction preparation.
Simmer the decoction mixture over low heat for 30-45 minutes to release the herbal compounds.
Strain the decoction mixture using a cheesecloth or fine mesh to separate the herbal solids.

remedies.remedy_desc: Vitex agnus-castus decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it regulates the body's endocrine system. The plant's active compounds, such as aucubin and ursolic acid, stimulate the pituitary gland, influencing hormone production. This leads to a balance in the levels of estrogen and progesterone, which can help alleviate symptoms like PMS, menstrual irregularities, and mood swings. By promoting a healthy balance of hormones, Vitex agnus-castus decoctions support women's reproductive health and overall well-being.
remedy_constituents: Iridoid glycosides: These compounds help regulate hormonal balance by influencing the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis, thereby affecting the release of gonadotropin-releasing hormone (GnRH) and luteinizing hormone (LH).
Acylated flavonoids: These flavonoids help alleviate hormonal imbalance by modulating the activity of enzymes involved in the biosynthesis of sex hormones, such as 17β-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase.
Diterpenoids: These compounds help mitigate hormonal imbalance by exerting anti-estrogenic effects, thereby potentially reducing the negative impact of excess estrogen on the body.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Vitex agnus-castus flowers are commonly used due to their high concentration of iridoid glycosides, which are believed to help regulate hormonal balance.
Leaves: The leaves of Vitex agnus-castus are used because they are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant properties and may help alleviate hormonal imbalances.
Seeds: Vitex agnus-castus seeds are utilized for their saponin content, which is thought to help modulate hormonal activity and promote balance in the body.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried vitex agnus-castus flowers in late summer or early fall for optimal potency.
Combine 2-4 grams of dried flowers or 5-10 grams of fresh flowers in a clean glass container.
Pour 1 quart of boiling water over the herbs and let steep for 10-15 minutes to release active compounds.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container to remove solids.
Store the decoction in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for longer storage and use as needed.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cimicifuga racemosa decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it is believed to influence the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, thereby regulating hormonal production. The presence of bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpenes and lignans in the plant is thought to contribute to its therapeutic effects. Studies suggest that Cimicifuga racemosa may help alleviate symptoms associated with menopausal hormonal changes, including hot flashes and mood disturbances, by modulating estrogen levels and promoting a state of balance in the body.
remedy_constituents: Isopimpinellin: It acts as an estrogen receptor modulator, which helps to regulate estrogen levels and alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalance.
Actein: It has been found to have a positive effect on the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, helping to regulate hormone production and reduce stress-related hormonal imbalances.

Cymar-3,9(11)-diene: This compound has been shown to have a direct effect on the body's hormone production, helping to regulate and balance the levels of various hormones, including estrogen and progesterone.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in lignans and other compounds that help regulate hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
Leaves: Contain bioactive compounds that contribute to the plant's hormonal balancing properties and are often used in combination with the roots.
Buds: May be used due to their potential to contain compounds that support hormonal balance and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause, but more research is needed to confirm their efficacy.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30-60 grams of dried cimicifuga racemosa root by selecting fresh rhizomes with intact roots.
Clean the root thoroughly by rinsing it with cold water to remove any debris.
Chop the cleaned root into smaller pieces using a sharp knife to increase its surface area.
Combine the chopped root with 1 liter of cold water in a saucepan and bring it to a boil.
Simmer the decoction for 5-7 minutes then let it steep for 10-15 minutes to release its active compounds.

remedies.remedy_desc: Astragalus membranaceus decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains adaptogenic compounds that regulate the body's response to stress, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. The decoction's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties may also help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, promoting a more balanced hormonal environment. Furthermore, Astragalus membranaceus is believed to stimulate the production of cortisol-regulating hormones, thereby supporting the body's natural ability to manage hormonal fluctuations and maintain homeostasis. This may lead to improved overall hormonal balance.
remedy_constituents: Trigonelline: It helps with hormonal imbalance by exerting an antioxidant effect and modulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis.
Saponins: They assist in balancing hormones by inhibiting the production of cortisol, a stress hormone, and promoting the production of insulin-like growth factor-1 (IGF-1).
Flavonoids: Flavonoids in Astragalus membranaceus decoctions have a regulatory effect on the HPA axis, helping to balance cortisol and insulin levels, and also exhibit antioxidant properties.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Astragalus membranaceus are the most commonly used part to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance, as they contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds that help regulate hormone production.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of Astragalus membranaceus are also used, as they are rich in saponins and flavonoids that can help balance hormones and reduce inflammation.

Stems: The stems of Astragalus membranaceus are sometimes used to make decoctions, as they contain a smaller amount of bioactive compounds compared to the roots and rhyzomes, but still offer some hormonal balancing properties.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 9-15 grams of dried astragalus membranaceus root in a clean glass container.
Boil 2-3 liters of water in a large pot over high heat for 10 minutes.
Add the weighed astragalus membranaceus root to the boiling water and reduce heat to low.
Simmer the mixture for 30-40 minutes or until the liquid has reduced by half.
Strain the decoction through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Trifolium pratense decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its rich content of isoflavones, particularly genistein and daidzein. These compounds mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, providing relief from symptoms associated with menopause and premenstrual syndrome. The decoction also contains other beneficial compounds like coumarins and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, further supporting hormonal balance and overall well-being. Regular consumption of Trifolium pratense decoctions may promote a healthy balance of estrogen levels.
remedy_constituents: Isoflavones: They help balance hormonal levels by acting as estrogen receptor agonists or antagonists, thereby modulating the body's response to estrogen and alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalance.
Saponins: They help regulate hormonal balance by inhibiting the activity of certain enzymes involved in hormone production and metabolism, thereby maintaining a healthy balance of hormonal levels.
Flavonoids: They help alleviate symptoms of hormonal imbalance by acting as antioxidant agents, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can disrupt normal hormonal function and balance.
remedy_parts: Roots: Trifolium pratense roots are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their isoflavone content, which helps regulate estrogen levels.
Leaves: Trifolium pratense leaves are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their isoflavone and phytoestrogen properties, which help alleviate menopausal symptoms.

Flowers: Trifolium pratense flowers are used to make decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to their high concentration of isoflavones, particularly formononetin and genistein, which support hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried trifolium pratense flowers and leaves in the early morning or evening.
Combine the trifolium pratense with 500 milliliters of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass or ceramic container.
Allow the mixture to steep for 15 to 30 minutes at room temperature or 5 to 10 minutes over low heat.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve to remove the solids from the solution.
Store the resulting decoction in airtight glass containers in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

remedies.remedy_desc: Avena sativa decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because they have a soothing effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels. This, in turn, helps to regulate the body's hormonal balance by influencing the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis. Avena sativa contains flavonoids and alkaloids that have a calming effect on the body, allowing the endocrine system to function more efficiently and promoting a natural balance of hormones. This makes it a popular natural remedy for addressing hormonal imbalances.
remedy_constituents: Avenacoside: Helps to regulate hormonal balance by acting as a phytoestrogen, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with estrogen deficiency or imbalance.
Beta-sitosterol: Exerts anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce stress and promote hormonal balance by mitigating the negative impact of stress on the endocrine system.

Avenanthramides: Demonstrates antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce stress and promote hormonal balance by protecting the body from oxidative stress and inflammation that can disrupt hormonal balance.
remedy_parts: Seeds: They are used due to their high content of phytosterols, which help in regulating hormones and reducing inflammation.
Roots: They are used due to their adaptogenic properties, which help in balancing the body's hormonal response to stress.
Leaves: They are used due to their high content of flavonoids and other antioxidants, which help in reducing inflammation and promoting hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 2-4 tablespoons of dried avena sativa root and stem parts in late summer or early fall.
Rinse the dried herbs in a fine mesh strainer under cold running water to remove impurities.
Combine the rinsed avena sativa with 1 quart of boiling water in a large ceramic pot.
Steep the mixture for 10-15 minutes and then strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter.
Store the cooled herbal decoction in the refrigerator for up to 3 days in a glass container.

remedies.remedy_desc: Panax ginseng decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its adaptogenic properties, which help to regulate the body's response to stress. The herbs in the decoction, particularly panax ginseng, stimulate the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, promoting a balance in hormone production and secretion. This, in turn, helps to alleviate symptoms associated with hormonal imbalances, such as mood swings, hot flashes, and fatigue. Additionally, panax ginseng has been shown to increase the production of neurotransmitters like serotonin and dopamine, further contributing to its balancing effects on the endocrine system.
remedy_constituents: Ginsenosides: Help to regulate hormonal balance by influencing the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, which plays a crucial role in the body's stress response and hormone regulation.
Terpenoids (specifically, ginsenoside Rb1): Act as a modulator of the hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis, helping to regulate the production of sex hormones such as estrogen and testosterone.

Phenolic compounds (specifically, ginsenoside Rg1): Have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help mitigate the negative effects of hormonal imbalance on the body, such as inflammation and oxidative stress.
remedy_parts: Roots: The primary component used in decoctions for hormonal imbalance due to its high concentration of ginsenosides, which have been shown to regulate hormonal balance.
Leaves: Used in combination with roots to enhance the decoction's effectiveness in balancing hormones due to the presence of other bioactive compounds.
Stems: Utilized to add additional ginsenosides and other bioactive compounds to the decoction, further supporting hormonal balance.
remedy_recipe: Cleanse the panax ginseng roots thoroughly with water to remove any dirt or impurities before proceeding.
Chop the cleaned panax ginseng roots into smaller pieces weighing about 15-20 grams for decoction.
Combine the chopped panax ginseng with 1.5 liters of water in a large saucepan and bring to boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 1-2 hours or until the liquid has reduced to 200-300 milliliters.
Strain the decoction through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean container and discard the solids.

remedies.remedy_desc: Lavandula angustifolia decoctions helps with hormonal imbalance because of its ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, which can contribute to hormonal imbalances. The calming properties of lavender may also help regulate the body's natural circadian rhythms, influencing the production of hormones such as cortisol and insulin. Additionally, lavender's phytoestrogenic properties may help balance estrogen levels, alleviating symptoms of hormonal imbalance like mood swings and hot flashes. This natural remedy can promote overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: Helps reduce stress and anxiety, which can contribute to hormonal imbalance by modulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis.
Linalyl acetate: Exhibits estrogenic activity, which can help alleviate menopausal symptoms and balance hormone levels.
Lavandulol: Demonstrates anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help mitigate the effects of hormonal fluctuations on the body.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are used due to their calming and balancing effect on the body's hormonal systems.
Flowers: They are used as they contain flavonoids and other compounds that help regulate hormonal imbalances and promote relaxation.
Stems: They are used as they contain a significant amount of essential oils, including linalool and linalyl acetate, which have a balancing effect on hormones.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 oz of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers and store them in a cool dark place.
Measure 1 teaspoon of the dried flowers and place them in a heat-resistant cup.
Boil 1 cup of water and pour it over the dried flowers in the cup.
Steep the mixture for 5-7 minutes or until the desired flavor and aroma are achieved.
Strain the decoction and discard the solids to obtain the herbal tea.
